overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a Native American camp in a forest clearing. The camera walks through the camp past traditional teepees and approaches a cooking fire where a woman is preparing food in a large hanging pot.

scene_state.functional_zone: Native American camp with teepees in forest clearing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the camp toward the central cooking area

notable_agents.action: woman standing by the cooking fire in the distance preparing food

entered.detail: large conical teepee with weathered canvas covering
tall teepee with smoke rising from the top
medium-sized teepee with wooden pole structure visible
campfire with flames and rising smoke
wooden pole structure supporting a cooking pot
large black iron pot suspended over the fire
dense pine forest surrounding the camp clearing
large gray rock in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The camera walks forward through a Native American camp set in a forest clearing. Several teepees are visible among the pine trees, with smoke rising from a central cooking fire where a woman stands in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cooking area with hanging pot over fire

events.description: slows down as arriving at the cooking fire area
steam becomes visible rising from the cooking pot

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing the woman cooking at the fire, watching her stir the pot

notable_agents.action: woman in traditional dress stirring the large pot suspended over the cooking fire

entered.detail: metal drinking cups placed on the ground near the fire
pile of cut wood for the fire

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at the central cooking area where a woman in traditional dress stirs a large pot hanging over a fire. Steam rises from the pot as the camera observes the cooking process from close range, with metal cups and firewood visible nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: cooking area with second person visible near teepee

events.description: second character becomes visible standing near the teepee in the background

agents.ego_description: circling around the cooking fire to view the scene from different angles

notable_agents.action: woman continues stirring the cooking pot over the fire
second person standing near teepee entrance observing the area

entered.detail: cluster of large rocks among the trees

segments.scene_description: The camera circles around the cooking fire, revealing a second person standing near a teepee in the background. The woman continues her cooking as the camera moves to show different angles of the camp and the surrounding forest rocks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a forest clearing that transitions from a wide view of a Native American camp to an intimate close-up of a cooking fire. It begins by walking forward past several teepees nestled among pine trees, moving toward a central fire where smoke rises into the air. As the camera arrives at the cooking area, the perspective shifts to a close-range view of a woman in traditional dress stirring a large, steaming pot surrounded by firewood and metal cups. The scene then expands as the camera circles the fire, revealing a second person standing by a distant teepee before panning to capture the surrounding forest rocks and the broader layout of the camp.
